name: Thorns
desc: Thorns 2.

name: Thorns2
desc:
Thorns 4.
Gain +1 Thorns when you take damage.

name: Heavy Handed
desc: +2 Knockback Damage.

name: HeavyHanded2
desc:
+3 Knockback Damage.
Your basic attack gains +3 Knockback.

name: Slack Off
desc: If you end your turn with unused movement actions, gain 8 HP.

name: SlackOff2
desc: If you end your turn with unused movement actions, gain +2 [img:con], 8 HP and 5 mana.

name: Scabs
desc: Gain +2 Shield when you take damage from an ability.

name: Scabs2
desc: Gain +2 Shield when you take damage from any source.

name: Thunder Thighs
desc: Trample.

name: ThunderThighs2
desc: Trample 9.

name: Plow
desc: When you knock back a unit, leave a rock where that unit was.

name: Plow2
desc:
When you knock back a unit, leave a rock where that unit was.
All damage you deal has +1 Knockback.

name: Pet Rocks
desc:
Rocks you spawn are alive!!
...and have +3 HP. Spawn a rock at the start of the battle.

name: PetRocks2
desc:
Rocks you spawn are alive, and hot!!
...and have +7 HP. Spawn a boulder at the start of the battle.

name: Toad Style
desc: Your movement action is a jump. Landing on a unit deals damage and displaces it.

name: ToadStyle2
desc: Your movement action is a jump. Landing on a unit deals damage and displaces it.

name: Chain Knockback
desc:
Your basic attack gains +1 Knockback.
Units you knockback will Knockback other units.

name: ChainKnockback2
desc:
Your basic attack gains +1 Knockback.
All knockback you deal is increased by 2 and deals +1 extra damage.
Units you knockback will Knockback other units further.

name: Protective
desc: Your allies have Brace 1.

name: Protective2
desc: Your allies have Brace 2.

name: Wrestlemaniac
desc:
Your basic attack becomes Suplex when adjacent to enemies.
You gain the ability Toss.

name: Wrestlemaniac2
desc:
Your basic attack is Suplex while you're next to a unit that can be suplexed and Your basic attack becomes Suplex when adjacent to enemies. +1 Bonus Move.
You gain the ability Toss+.

name: Mountain Form
desc:
Knockback immunity.
Tiles you walk over become dirt and may spawn rocks.

name: MountainForm2
desc:
Trample. Knockback and Fire immunity.
Tiles you walk over become dirt and may spawn rocks.

name: Home Run
desc: Knockback you deal is increased by 10.

name: HomeRun2
desc: Knockback you deal is increased by 10 and inflicts Bruise 1.

name: Rock Aspect
desc: Units that attack or contact you have a 10% chance to get Petrified.

name: RockAspect2
desc: Units that attack or contact you have a 20% chance to get Petrified.

name: Wide Load
desc: When an adjacent ally is targeted by an enemy, swap places with the ally.

name: WideLoad2
desc: When an adjacent ally is targeted by an enemy, gain +1 temp Thorns and temp Brace, then swap places with the ally.

name: Hard Head
desc: You block attacks from the front.

name: HardHead2
desc: You block attacks from the front. Your basic attack inflicts Bruise.

name: My Leg!
desc:
All injuries you get are Broken Legs.
If you have four broken legs, gain +4 Thorns, Trample, and adjacent allies have Toss as a bonus ability.

name: MyLeg2
desc:
All injuries you get are Broken Legs.
If you have four broken legs, gain +4 Thorns, +4 Brace, Trample, and adjacent allies have Toss as a bonus ability.

name: Hardy
desc: Heal to full HP at the start of each battle.

name: Hardy2
desc: Heal to full HP at the start of each battle. +3 Health Regeneration.

name: Slow and Steady
desc: Gain -2 [img:spd] and +1 Range at the end of each turn. If your [img:spd] is 0, you can attack an extra time each turn.

name: SlowandSteady2
desc: Gain -2 [img:spd], +1 Range, +1 [img:str], and +1 [img:int] at the end of each turn. If your [img:spd] is 0, you can attack an extra time each turn.

name: Follow Up
desc: After you use your basic attack, dash forward as far as you can.

name: FollowUp2
desc: After you use your basic attack, dash forward as far as you can and do a melee attack.

name: Cat-A-Pult
desc: You can throw adjacent allies up to 4 tiles on their turns without using their movement action.

name: CatAPult2
desc: You can throw adjacent allies to any tile on their turns without using their movement action.

name: Shoving Match
desc:
When you knock a unit into an ally, or knock an ally into an enemy, that ally uses their basic attack on the other unit.
Your basic attack has +1 Knockback.

name: ShovingMatch2
desc:
When you knock a unit into an ally, or knock an ally into an enemy, that ally uses their basic attack on the other unit.
Your basic attack has +2 Knockback. You deal no damage to allies.

name: Stoic
desc: If you end your turn with unused movement actions, gain +2 Bonus Moves.

name: Stoic2
desc: If you end your turn with unused movement actions, gain +2 Bonus Moves, +2 [img:shield] and +1 Brace.

name: Priority Target
desc: Enemies will attack you instead of your allies if they can.

name: PriorityTarget2
desc: +2 Thorns, +2 Brace, and +2 Health Regeneration. Enemies will attack you instead of your allies if they can.

name: Bouncer
desc: When an ally takes damage, move 3 tiles toward the source of the damage and attack it if you can.

name: Bouncer2
desc: When an ally takes damage, full move toward the source of the damage and attack it if you can.
